pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty— 1.1052 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuses Triton/CUTLASS MLP kernels, wider 3.5× MLP, mixed int5/int6 quantization, and a fast causal n-gram tilt as sparse auxiliary memory to stay under 16MB.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward and CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels with precomputed activation gradients
Hessian-trace mixed int5/int6 GPTQ quantization to support the wider 3.5× MLP
Fast GPU causal n-gram tilt acting as a sparse auxiliary memory with subword certainty
